---
title: ""
subtitle: ""
date: today
date-format: "D MMMM YYYY"
lang: en
bibliography: references.bib
citeproc: false
format:
  typst:
    toc: false
    font-paths:
      - assets/fonts/source-sans3
      - assets/fonts/source-serif4
    template-partials:
      - styles/page.typ
      - styles/typst-template.typ
    include-in-header: styles/sitrep.typ
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
editor: visual
---

```{=typst}
// ── PAGE 1 ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

// Header: logos + title bar
#grid(
  columns: (1fr, auto, auto),
  gutter: 8pt,
  align: (left + horizon, right + horizon, right + horizon),
  [
#text(size: 12pt, fill: rgb("#5f7078"))[#upper[Reporting period: DD Month YYYY to DD Month YYYY]]
#v(1pt)

#block(
  below: 5pt,
  fill: rgb("#e3e5e7"),
  inset: (x: 10pt, y: 5pt),
  radius: 2pt,
)[
  #set text(size: 15pt, weight: "bold", fill: rgb("#334047"))
  #upper[SITUATION REPORT: Lorem Ipsum | Dolor Sit] \
  #upper[DIGITAL TRACE DATA | EXPERIMENTAL]
]

  ],
  [#image("assets/gds_logo_1.png", width: 82pt)],
  [#image("assets/uol_logo.png", width: 90pt)],
)

#v(1pt)
#text(size: 10pt, fill: rgb("#5f7078"), stretch: 85%)[
  Lorem Ipsum, Dolor Sit, Amet Consectetur, Adipiscing Elit | #emph[Lorem Ipsum Institute, Dolor University]
]
#v(1pt)
#line(length: 100%, stroke: 1pt + rgb("#0D2B4E"))
#v(1pt)

// Main two-column layout: figure + trigger left, sidebar right (2 boxes)
#grid(
  columns: (2fr, 1fr),
  gutter: 6pt,
  align: (top + left, top + left),

  // LEFT: main figure + caption + event trigger
  [
    // ── FIGURE 1 PLACEHOLDER — replace with your summary map ──
    #block(
      width: 100%,
      height: 7cm,
      fill: rgb("#f0f2f4"),
      stroke: (paint: rgb("#aabbc4"), thickness: 0.8pt, dash: "dashed"),
      radius: 3pt,
    )[
      #align(center + horizon)[
        #text(size: 11pt, fill: rgb("#8a97a0"), style: "italic")[
          Figure 1 — main summary map \ (insert your figure here)
        ]
      ]
    ]
    #v(-4pt)
    #text(size: 7.5pt, fill: rgb("#5f7078"), style: "italic")[
      Figure 1. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit.
    ]

    #v(3pt)

    // Event Trigger — under the figure
    #block(
      width: 98%,
      fill: rgb("#fff5f5"),
      stroke: (
        left: 3pt + rgb("#8B0000"),
        top: 0.45pt + rgb("#8B0000"),
        right: 0.45pt + rgb("#8B0000"),
        bottom: 0.45pt + rgb("#8B0000"),
      ),
      radius: 2pt,
      inset: (x: 8pt, y: 6pt),
    )[
      #text(size: 10.5pt, weight: "bold", fill: rgb("#0D2B4E"))[Event Trigger]
      #v(1pt)
      #set text(size: 9.5pt, fill: rgb("#132833"))
      - #strong[Lorem ipsum dolor:] sit amet consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna. \
      - #strong[Ut enim ad minim:] veniam quis nostrud exercitation ullamco laboris nisi ut aliquip.
    ]
  ],

  // RIGHT: two stacked boxes (headline + insights)
  [
    // Headline figure
    #block(
      width: 100%,
      fill: rgb("#0D2B4E"),
      stroke: 0.5pt + rgb("#0D2B4E"),
      radius: 3pt,
      inset: (x: 8pt, y: 10pt),
    )[
      #align(center)[
        #text(size: 9.5pt, weight: "bold", fill: rgb("#a8c4d4"))[#upper[Lorem ipsum · dolor sit YYYY]]
        #v(1pt)
        #block(spacing: 10pt)[
          #text(size: 25pt, weight: "bold", fill: rgb("#ffffff"))[\~00,000]
        ]
        #v(1pt)
        #text(size: 9.5pt, fill: rgb("#a8c4d4"))[lorem ipsum dolor · sit amet data]
        #v(0pt)
        #line(length: 100%, stroke: 0.4pt + rgb("#a8c4d4"))
        #v(1pt)
        #text(size: 9pt, fill: rgb("#a8c4d4"))[#strong[00,000] lorem · #strong[00+] ipsum · #text(size: 8.5pt, fill: rgb("#6a8fa8"))[Source, YYYY]]
        #v(2pt)
        #text(size: 8pt, fill: rgb("#6a8fa8"), style: "italic")[Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet (Figure 1).]
      ]
    ]

    #v(-4pt)

    // Insights
    #block(
      width: 100%,
      fill: rgb("#f0f9ff"),
      stroke: (
        left: 3pt + rgb("#0D2B4E"),
        top: 0.45pt + rgb("#0D2B4E"),
        right: 0.45pt + rgb("#0D2B4E"),
        bottom: 0.45pt + rgb("#0D2B4E"),
      ),
      radius: 2pt,
      inset: (x: 8pt, y: 8pt),
    )[
      #text(size: 10pt, weight: "bold", fill: rgb("#0D2B4E"))[Insights]
      #v(0pt)
      #set text(size: 9.5pt, fill: rgb("#132833"))

      Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua #cite(<iradukunda2025estimating>).
#v(0pt)
Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud exercitation ullamco laboris — #strong[duis aute irure dolor] in reprehenderit. Key advantages are #strong[lorem ipsum] and #strong[dolor sit].
      #v(0pt)
      - #strong[Lorem ipsum dolor]: sit amet consectetur adipiscing elit sed do eiusmod.
      #v(0pt)
      - #strong[Excepteur sint occaecat]: cupidatat non proident sunt in culpa qui officia.
      #v(0pt)
      - #strong[Sed ut perspiciatis]: unde omnis iste natus error sit voluptatem accusantium.
      #v(0pt)
      - #strong[Nemo enim ipsam]: voluptatem quia voluptas sit aspernatur aut odit aut fugit.
      #v(0pt)
      - Neque porro quisquam est qui dolorem ipsum quia dolor sit amet by #strong[DD Month].
    ]
  ],
)
```
```{=typst}
// ── PAGE 2 ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

// Header
#grid(
  columns: (1fr, auto, auto),
  gutter: 5pt,
  align: (left + horizon, right + horizon, right + horizon),
  [
    #set text(fill: rgb("#0D2B4E"))
    #text(size: 13pt, weight: "bold")[Situation Report] \
    #text(size: 11pt)[Lorem Ipsum, Dolor: Sit Amet — Month YYYY] \
    #text(size: 8.5pt, fill: rgb("#5f7078"))[#upper[Reporting period: DD–DD Month YYYY]]
  ]
)

#v(2pt)
#line(length: 100%, stroke: 1pt + rgb("#0D2B4E"))
#v(8pt)

// Two-column: figure left, context right
#grid(
  columns: (1.2fr, 0.8fr),
  gutter: 14pt,
  align: (top + left, top + left),

  // LEFT: context figure
  [
    // ── FIGURE 2 PLACEHOLDER — replace with your context map ──
    #block(
      width: 100%,
      height: 8.5cm,
      fill: rgb("#f0f2f4"),
      stroke: (paint: rgb("#aabbc4"), thickness: 0.8pt, dash: "dashed"),
      radius: 3pt,
    )[
      #align(center + horizon)[
        #text(size: 11pt, fill: rgb("#8a97a0"), style: "italic")[
          Figure 2 — context map \ (insert your figure here)
        ]
      ]
    ]
    #v(3pt)
    #text(size: 7.5pt, fill: rgb("#5f7078"), style: "italic")[
      Figure 2. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit.
       #v(0pt)
      #set text(size: 7pt, fill: rgb("#5f7078"))
    - #strong[Lorem:] ipsum dolor sit amet
    - #strong[Dolor:] consectetur adipiscing elit sed
    - #strong[Sit amet:] eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore
    ]
  ],

  // RIGHT: three stacked boxes
  [
    // Box 1 — Context
    #block(
      width: 100%,
      fill: rgb("#f0f9ff"),
      stroke: (
        left: 3pt + rgb("#0D2B4E"),
        top: 0.45pt + rgb("#0D2B4E"),
        right: 0.45pt + rgb("#0D2B4E"),
        bottom: 0.45pt + rgb("#0D2B4E"),
      ),
      radius: 2pt,
      inset: (x: 6pt, y: 6pt),
    )[
      #text(size: 9pt, weight: "bold", fill: rgb("#0D2B4E"))[Context]
      #v(2pt)
      #set text(size: 9pt, fill: rgb("#132833"))
      - Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur #strong[adipiscing elit], sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore.
      #v(0pt)
      - Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud #strong[exercitation ullamco] laboris nisi ut aliquip ex ea.
      #v(0pt)
      - Duis aute irure dolor in reprehenderit in voluptate velit #strong[esse cillum dolore].
      #v(0pt)
      - Excepteur sint occaecat: \~#strong[[ — ]] lorem ipsum dolor and \~#strong[[ — ]] sit amet consectetur.
    ]

    #v(0pt)

    // Box 2 — Warning gap
    #block(
      width: 100%,
      fill: rgb("#f0f9ff"),
      stroke: (
        left: 3pt + rgb("#0D2B4E"),
        top: 0.45pt + rgb("#0D2B4E"),
        right: 0.45pt + rgb("#0D2B4E"),
        bottom: 0.45pt + rgb("#0D2B4E"),
      ),
      radius: 2pt,
      inset: (x: 6pt, y: 6pt),
    )[
      #text(size: 9pt, weight: "bold", fill: rgb("#0D2B4E"))[Warning gap]
      #v(4pt)
      #set text(size: 9pt, fill: rgb("#132833"))
      - Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet (#strong[consectetur adipiscing elit]) — sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt.
      #v(0pt)
      - Ut enim ad minim veniam flagged #strong[000 communities]; alerts in #strong[00] and #strong[00] dolor sit.
      #v(0pt)
      - #strong[Duis aute irure dolor] in reprehenderit — lorem on DD Month; ipsum DD–DD Month.
      #v(4pt)
      #set text(size: 8.5pt, fill: rgb("#5f7078"), style: "italic")
      Lorem ipsum: dolor, sit, amet and consectetur. Excepteur sint occaecat cupidatat non proident sunt in culpa qui officia deserunt mollit.
    ]

    #v(2pt)

    // Box 3 — Limitations (amber)
    #block(
      width: 100%,
      fill: rgb("#fdf6e8"),
      stroke: (
        left: 3pt + rgb("#b8860b"),
        top: 0.45pt + rgb("#b8860b"),
        right: 0.45pt + rgb("#b8860b"),
        bottom: 0.45pt + rgb("#b8860b"),
      ),
      radius: 2pt,
      inset: (x: 6pt, y: 6pt),
    )[
      #text(size: 9pt, weight: "bold", fill: rgb("#8b5e00"))[Limitations]
      #v(4pt)
      #set text(size: 9pt, fill: rgb("#132833"))
      - #strong[Lorem ipsum:] dolor sit amet consectetur adipiscing elit sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt.
      #v(1pt)
      - #strong[Dolor sit amet:] consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore.
      #v(1pt)
      - #strong[Ut enim ad minim:] veniam quis nostrud exercitation ullamco laboris nisi.
      #v(3pt)
      Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet #link("https://example.org")[(Source, YYYY)]. #emph[Excepteur sint occaecat cupidatat non proident before interpreting these findings.]
    ]
  ],
)
```
```{=typst}
// ── PAGE 3 ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// Header
#grid(
  columns: (1fr, auto, auto),
  gutter: 5pt,
  align: (left + horizon, right + horizon, right + horizon),
  [
    #set text(fill: rgb("#0D2B4E"))
    #text(size: 13pt, weight: "bold")[Situation Report] \
    #text(size: 11pt)[Lorem Ipsum, Dolor: Sit Amet — Month YYYY] \
    #text(size: 8.5pt, fill: rgb("#5f7078"))[#upper[Reporting period: DD–DD Month YYYY]]
  ],
)

#v(2pt)
#line(length: 100%, stroke: 1pt + rgb("#0D2B4E"))
#v(0pt)

// Time-series (left) + methodology boxes (right)
#grid(
  columns: (1.5fr, 1fr),
  gutter: 10pt,
  align: (top + left, top + left),

  // LEFT: time-series figure
  [
    #text(size: 9pt, weight: "bold", fill: rgb("#0D2B4E"))[Time-series analysis]
    #v(4pt)
    // ── FIGURE 3 PLACEHOLDER — replace with your time-series maps ──
    #block(
      width: 100%,
      height: 7cm,
      fill: rgb("#f0f2f4"),
      stroke: (paint: rgb("#aabbc4"), thickness: 0.8pt, dash: "dashed"),
      radius: 3pt,
    )[
      #align(center + horizon)[
        #text(size: 11pt, fill: rgb("#8a97a0"), style: "italic")[
          Figure 3 — time-series / daily maps \ (insert your figure here)
        ]
      ]
    ]
    #v(3pt)
    #text(size: 7.5pt, fill: rgb("#5f7078"), style: "italic")[
      Figure 3. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit.
    ]
  ],

  // RIGHT: Data Sources + Methodology + Table (stacked)
  [
    #block(
      width: 100%,
      fill: rgb("#f0f9ff"),
      stroke: (
        left: 3pt + rgb("#0D2B4E"),
        top: 0.45pt + rgb("#0D2B4E"),
        right: 0.45pt + rgb("#0D2B4E"),
        bottom: 0.45pt + rgb("#0D2B4E"),
      ),
      radius: 2pt,
      inset: (x: 6pt, y: 5pt),
    )[
      #text(size: 8.5pt, weight: "bold", fill: rgb("#0D2B4E"))[Data Sources]
      #v(3pt)
      #set text(size: 8pt, fill: rgb("#132833"))
      #strong[Lorem ipsum.] Dolor sit amet consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.
      #v(2pt)
      #strong[Dolor sit.] Amet consectetur adipiscing elit sed do eiusmod.
      #v(2pt)
      #strong[Consectetur.] [ Lorem | Ipsum | Dolor | ].
      #v(3pt)
      #text(size: 7pt, fill: rgb("#5f7078"))[Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet; figures are indicative of patterns, not precise counts.]
    ]

    #v(0pt)

    #block(
      width: 100%,
      fill: rgb("#f0f9ff"),
      stroke: (
        left: 3pt + rgb("#0D2B4E"),
        top: 0.45pt + rgb("#0D2B4E"),
        right: 0.45pt + rgb("#0D2B4E"),
        bottom: 0.45pt + rgb("#0D2B4E"),
      ),
      radius: 2pt,
      inset: (x: 6pt, y: 5pt),
    )[
      #text(size: 8.5pt, weight: "bold", fill: rgb("#0D2B4E"))[Methodology]
      #v(3pt)
      #set text(size: 8pt, fill: rgb("#132833"))
      #strong[Step 1.] Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet consectetur (DD–DD Month YYYY).
      #v(2pt)
      #strong[Step 2.] Adipiscing elit sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore (DD–DD Month YYYY).
      #v(2pt)
      #strong[Step 3.] Ut enim ad minim veniam; quis nostrud exercitation.
    ]

     #v(0pt)

    #set text(size: 8pt, weight: "regular", fill: rgb("#132833"))
    #table(
      columns: (1.4fr, 0.7fr, 1.9fr),
      align: (left, center, left),
      inset: (x: 5pt, y: 3pt),
      stroke: (x: none, y: 0.4pt + rgb("#c4ced4")),
      fill: (col, row) => if row == 0 { rgb("#0B1A2E") } else if calc.odd(row) { rgb("#f4f6f7") } else { white },
      table.header(
        [#text(weight: "bold", fill: white)[Indicator]],
        [#text(weight: "bold", fill: white)[Available]],
        [#text(weight: "bold", fill: white)[Use in this report]],
      ),
      [Lorem ipsum data], [#text(fill: rgb("#2E7D32"), weight: "bold")[YES]], [Dolor sit amet consectetur],
      [Dolor sit data], [#text(fill: rgb("#2E7D32"), weight: "bold")[YES]], [Adipiscing elit sed do],
      [Consectetur source], [#text(fill: rgb("#B8860B"), weight: "bold")[PARTIAL]], [Eiusmod tempor; not used],
      [Adipiscing requests], [#text(fill: rgb("#2E7D32"), weight: "bold")[YES]], [Not used in this report],
      [Tempor activity], [#text(fill: rgb("#B8860B"), weight: "bold")[PARTIAL]], [Not used in this report],
      [Incididunt pageviews], [#text(fill: rgb("#B8860B"), weight: "bold")[PARTIAL]], [Not used in this report],
      [Labore lights], [#text(fill: rgb("#B8860B"), weight: "bold")[PARTIAL]], [Not used in this report],
      [Dolore estimates], [#text(fill: rgb("#C0392B"), weight: "bold")[NO]], [Not used in this report],
    )
    #v(3pt)
    #text(size: 7.5pt, fill: rgb("#5f7078"), style: "italic")[
      Table 1. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet. Sources marked PARTIAL are available but with limited coverage or resolution.
    ]
  ],   // ← closes the RIGHT column cell
)     // ← closes the #grid
```
::: {.content-visible when-format="typst"}
```{=typst}
#grid(
  columns: (1fr, auto, 1fr, auto, 1fr, auto, 1fr, auto, 1fr),
  gutter: 4pt,
  align: center + horizon,

  [
    #rect(width: 100%, radius: 3pt, inset: 6pt, fill: rgb("#f5f7f8"), stroke: 0.5pt + rgb("#aabbc4"))[
      #set text(size: 7pt, fill: rgb("#132833"))
      #strong[Lorem ipsum] #linebreak() dolor sit amet #linebreak() #strong[consectetur] #linebreak() adipiscing elit
    ]
  ],
  [#text(size: 9pt, fill: rgb("#000000"))[→]],
  [
    #rect(width: 100%, radius: 3pt, inset: 6pt, fill: rgb("#e8f4f6"), stroke: 0.5pt + rgb("#8ab8c2"))[
      #set text(size: 7pt, fill: rgb("#0B1A2E"))
      #strong[Step one] #linebreak() DD–DD Month YYYY
    ]
  ],
  [#text(size: 9pt, fill: rgb("#000000"))[→]],
  [
    #rect(width: 100%, radius: 3pt, inset: 6pt, fill: rgb("#e8f4f6"), stroke: 0.5pt + rgb("#8ab8c2"))[
      #set text(size: 7pt, fill: rgb("#0B1A2E"))
      #strong[Step two] #linebreak() DD–DD Month YYYY
    ]
  ],
  [#text(size: 9pt, fill: rgb("#000000"))[→]],
  [
    #rect(width: 100%, radius: 3pt, inset: 6pt, fill: rgb("#e8f4f6"), stroke: 0.5pt + rgb("#8ab8c2"))[
      #set text(size: 7pt, fill: rgb("#0B1A2E"))
      #strong[Step three] #linebreak() lorem vs. ipsum
    ]
  ],
  [#text(size: 9pt, fill: rgb("#000000"))[→]],
  [
    #rect(width: 100%, radius: 3pt, inset: 6pt, fill: rgb("#2a4a6b"), stroke: 0.5pt + rgb("#1A3A5C"))[
      #set text(size: 7pt, fill: rgb("#ffffff"))
      #strong[Output] #linebreak() Lorem ipsum index
    ]
  ],
)
```
:::

::: {.content-visible when-format="typst"}
```{=typst}
#v(0pt)
#show bibliography: set text(size: 6pt, fill: rgb("#5f7078"), font: "Source Sans 3")
#set bibliography(style: "ieee", title: text(size: 7pt, fill: rgb("#5f7078"), font: "Source Sans 3")[Bibliography])
```
:::
